name: LED Controller (CV-RGB+CCT)

description.consumer:
Every colour. Every white. One controller.

From vibrant RGB to tunable warm-to-cool white — the CV RGB+CCT Controller gives your LED strips full range. Set the mood for every moment, every room, automatically.
description.technical:
A constant voltage LED controller for RGB+CCT LED strips, providing independent control over color (RGB), white temperature (CCT), and brightness across 5 output channels.

Requires an appropriate constant voltage DC power supply (12V or 24V) matched to the LED strip specification. Designed for panel or concealed installation.

Key Specifications
- Output: CV (Constant Voltage)
- LED Support: RGB + CCT (5-channel)
- Channels: 5 (R, G, B, CW, WW)
- Installation: Indoor panel or concealed

⚠ Requires an appropriate CV DC power supply (12V/24V). Does not power LED strips directly from mains voltage.

limitations: Requires appropriate CV DC power supply. Does not power LEDs from mains directly.
dependencies: Compatible CV DC power supply (12V or 24V) required
